title: Write
author: The Guardian
targetAudience: Aspiring writers and individuals looking to improve their writing skills
relatedBooks: On Writing: A Memoir of the Craft by Stephen King
Bird by Bird: Some Instructions on Writing and Life by Anne Lamott
The Elements of Style by William Strunk Jr. and E.B. White
keyInsights: Writing is a skill that can be developed
